strengths: 15+ years of diversified software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling contributions (MCP code generators, Model Context Protocol frameworks)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) demonstrating autonomy and innovation in building platforms
concerns: No explicit AI/ML or cloud product development experience beyond agentic workflows
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field despite long career in software engineering
Limited evidence of recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products/platforms built with AI
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience requirement (15 years) and demonstrates technical breadth including AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, but lacks direct evidence of AI/ML expertise, cloud product leadership, or recognized AI innovations. While entrepreneurial (GISCollective) and AI-agent contributions exist, there is no clear demonstration of building AI-powered products/platforms or strategic cloud/AI differentiation—core to the role's responsibilities.
